---

description: "Retrieve a list of untargeted offers."
sidebar_label: "Retrieve untargeted offers"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve untargeted offers"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/offers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a list of untargeted offers.

## Pagination

Pagination is optional. When `per_page` is provided, the response includes a `pagination` object inside `data` with metadata for iterating through pages.

When `per_page` is omitted, all offers are returned in a single response (original behavior).

**Note:** If you provide `page` without `per_page`, the request will return a `422` validation error.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"per_page","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Number of offers to return per page. When provided, enables paginated responses.\nMust be between 1 and 100. Required if `page` is specified.\n","schema":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":100,"example":25}},{"name":"page","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Page number to retrieve (1-indexed). Defaults to 1 when `per_page` is provided.\nCannot be used without `per_page`.\n","schema":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"default":1,"example":1}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"A list of offers. When `per_page` is provided, includes pagination metadata.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["status","data","links"],"properties":{"status":{"type":"string","example":"success"},"data":{"type":"object","required":["offers"],"properties":{"offers":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","x-tags":["offer"],"required":["id","name","tracking_type","total_payout_usd","total_amount","start_datetime","completion_difficulty","is_multi_reward","creatives","goals","links","stats","geo_targeting","device_targeting","os_targeting"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","example":"1234567894561234567"},"campaign_id":{"type":"integer","example":1},"name":{"type":"string","example":"Offer Name"},"store_id":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"com.adgem.app"},"tracking_type":{"type":"string","enum":["CPI","CPE","CPA","CPC","Market Research"]},"total_payout_usd":{"type":"number","format":"float","example":1},"total_amount":{"type":"number","format":"float","example":5},"start_datetime":{"type":"string","example":"2024-01-01 00:00:00"},"completion_difficulty":{"type":"integer","example":1},"is_multi_reward":{"type":"boolean","example":false},"is_featured_campaign":{"type":"boolean","example":false},"campaign_vertical":{"type":"string","example":"Content Discovery"},"updated_at":{"type":"string","example":"2024-01-01 00:00:00"},"creatives":{"required":["name","icon_url","description","instructions","categories","stickers","basic_requirements"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string","example":"Offer Name"},"icon_url":{"type":"string","example":"https://adgem.com/images/offerwall/offerwall_icon.png"},"description":{"type":"string","example":"Offer Description"},"short_description":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"Offer Short Description"},"instructions":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"example":["Offer Instruction 1","Offer Instruction 2"]},"disclaimer":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"Offer Disclaimer"},"currency_name":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"Coin"},"currency_name_plural":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"Coins"},"categories":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["app","free","paid","survey","trial","user_info_request"]},"example":["app"]},"sort_order_setting":{"type":"integer","nullable":true,"example":1},"stickers":{"type":"array","items":{"x-tags":["offer"],"properties":{"text":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"New"},"color":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"#FF0000"}},"type":"object","title":"Sticker"}},"hero_image_url":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"https://adgem.com/images/offerwall/offerwall_hero.png"},"offer_cta":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"Click to earn now!"},"basic_requirements":{"type":"array","items":{"x-tags":["offer"],"required":["description","order"],"properties":{"description":{"type":"string","example":"Must be a new user."},"order":{"type":"integer","example":1}},"type":"object","title":"Basic Requirements"}},"offer_tip":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"Make in-app purchases to earn faster!"}},"type":"object"},"goals":{"type":"array","items":{"x-tags":["offer"],"required":["amount","payout_usd"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","example":"118093008515239936"},"name":{"type":"string","example":"Level 1"},"description":{"type":"string","example":"Complete Level 1"},"amount":{"type":"integer","example":1},"payout_usd":{"type":"number","format":"float","example":1},"order":{"type":"integer","nullable":true,"example":1},"non_linear":{"type":"boolean","example":false},"is_purchase_goal":{"type":"boolean","example":false},"is_attribution":{"type":"boolean","example":false},"maximum_completion_time_days":{"type":"integer","nullable":true,"example":30}},"type":"object","title":"Goal"}},"links":{"required":["click_url","support_url"],"properties":{"click_url":{"type":"string","example":"https://api.adgem.com/v1/click?all=1&appid=1&cid=100&playerid={playerid}"},"support_url":{"type":"string","example":"https://adunits.adgem.com/support-single-offer?appid=1&playerid={playerid}&campaignid=100"},"interstitial_url":{"type":"string","description":"Present when a click URL exists; derived from the click URL.","example":"https://api.adgem.com/offer-interstitial?all=1&appid=1&cid=100&playerid={playerid}"}},"type":"object"},"stats":{"properties":{"network_epc":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"0.1"},"network_epi":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"0.1"}},"type":"object"},"geo_targeting":{"properties":{"countries":{"type":"array","items":{"x-tags":["offer"],"required":["name"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string","example":"United States"},"slug":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"united-states"},"iso_numeric":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"840"},"iso_alpha2":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"US"},"iso_alpha3":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"USA"},"geoname_id":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"6252001"}},"type":"object","title":"Country"}},"states":{"type":"array","items":{"x-tags":["offer"],"required":["name"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string","example":"California"},"slug":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"california"},"geoname_id":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"5332921"}},"type":"object","title":"State"}},"cities":{"type":"array","items":{"x-tags":["offer"],"required":["name"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string","example":"Los Angeles"},"slug":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"los-angeles"},"geoname_id":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"example":"5368361"}},"type":"object","title":"City"}}},"type":"object"},"device_targeting":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["android","ios","ios_app","desktop"]},"example":["android","ios"]},"os_targeting":{"type":"array","items":{"title":"OS","x-tags":["offer"],"required":["name"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string","enum":["android","ios","web"]},"min":{"type":"string","example":"4.0"},"max":{"type":"string","example":"10.0"}},"type":"object"},"example":[{"name":"android","min":"4.0","max":"10.0"}]},"app_store_categories":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","example":"Casual"},"example":["Casual","Action","Adventure"]},"attribution_window_days":{"type":"integer","example":30}},"title":"Offer"}},"pagination":{"type":"object","description":"Included in the response only when `per_page` is provided in the request.","required":["current_page","per_page","has_more_pages","next_page"],"properties":{"current_page":{"type":"integer","description":"The current page number.","example":1},"per_page":{"type":"integer","description":"The number of offers per page.","example":25},"has_more_pages":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether there are additional pages of results.","example":true},"next_page":{"type":"integer","nullable":true,"description":"The next page number, or `null` if there are no more pages.","example":2}},"title":"Pagination"}},"description":"Contains the `offers` array. When `per_page` is provided in the request, also includes a `pagination` object.\n"},"links":{"type":"object","properties":{"support_portal":{"type":"string","example":"https://adunits.adgem.com/support/player?appid={appId}&playerid={playerid}"}}}},"title":"OffersResponse"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"422":{"description":"Validation error (e.g., `page` provided without `per_page`, or values out of range)"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
